commentaries.author: Augustine of Hippo
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh As soon as they hear of me, they shall obey me: the foreigners shall submit themselves unto me. Augustine of Hippo 45. "Thou shalt make Me the head of the Gentiles. A people whom I have not known have served Me. " The people of the Gentiles, whom in bodily presence I have not visited, have served Me. "At the hearing of the ear they have obeyed Me" (ver. They have not seen Me with the eye: but, receiving my preachers, at the hearing of the ear they have obeyed Me.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
